calendar.matters:
PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together:
PES-24-308040, Estate of Frances Ishida; and
PES-24-308042, Estate of Tadashi Ishida

Appearances:
Alec Harrington for Satomi Ishida, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Mr. Harrington clarified that the subject of the petitions is a strip of land approximately four inches wide, which appears to have resulted from an informal property line adjustment in the 1960s and is now causing a title issue. The assigned probate referee determined that the parcel has no independent value.

Mr. Harrington acknowledged the tentative ruling's concern regarding the use of the term "personal representative" and agreed that the term was used inappropriately. He confirmed that the petitioner sold the affected property to her grandchildren, the current owners, who have filed consents in these proceedings.

The Court inquired as to Petitioner's standing. Counsel responded that Satomi Ishida is a named beneficiary under the will of Francis Ishida, the surviving spouse of Tadashi Ishida, and the co-trustee of the trust she held with Tadashi.

The court took both submissions under submission with the intent to grant. In the Estate of Francis Ishida, the subject real property shall pass 50% to Satomi Ishida and 50% to Tadashi Ishida. The property will not pass to Satomi in her capacity as a personal representative, as she is not one. In the Estate of Tadashi Ishida, Tadashi's 50% interest shall pass to Satomi Ishida as trustee of their trust.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Continued To Apr-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
